hooks.command: echo 'RE-GROUND FIRST: FROGS 5 Skyrim campaign. Before asserting any story fact or doing design work, read CLAUDE.md and Toryggs legacy/AI_README, then open the actual source (narrative chapters read IN ORDER are authoritative; trackers lag). Never state campaign canon from memory or the context summary.'

printf '%s' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"CANON-WRITE CHECK: If this edits a source-of-truth doc (The Narrative/, world state tracking/, web/, Players/, Npcs/, factions/, Adventure modules/), verify every factual claim against source (cite chapter/line) before saving. Silent inaccuracies in canon are the worst failure mode."}}'

printf '%s' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"UserPromptSubmit","additionalContext":"GATES (every reply, no exceptions): G0 NO-SOURCE-NO-INVENT GATE (CLAUDE.md Rule 1, WRITING GUIDE Section XI) -- this campaign has a source of truth for nearly every possibility (geography, voice, mechanics, history, prior decisions). Creativity is licensed ONLY by a genuine, CHECKED absence of a source -- never by convenience. Before inventing any detail, check for it; if a reference (image, doc, prior message) already answered a question, re-open THAT, do not redraw/reimagine it. G1 CITATION GATE -- no canon claim, dialogue draft, or scene prose goes to the GM unless THIS message shows the source check first: file + line, QUOTED, not just claimed checked. G6 DIALOGUE GATE -- any line of dialogue for a named character needs an explicit pass/fail check against WRITING GUIDE Section IX rules 0-8, shown inline, before the line is presented -- INCLUDING Rule 8: no line may explain, in the same breath, why it is being said (no I will tell you X because Y self-justifying dialogue). G7 GATED-CLUE GATE (WRITING GUIDE Section X) -- any discoverable object placed behind a roll/difficulty must ship with its ACTUAL content in the same message (what it says, what it means, what a player can do with it) -- never a thematic image implying depth with nothing behind it; if the content is not ready, present the object as un-gated flavor instead, not as a check. Re-verify EVERY factual claim in a draft against source immediately before showing it -- a prior citation earlier in the conversation does not cover a new line written after it. Do not invent attributions, event order, or character reactions that are not directly sourced."}}'
